ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "laestab" INTEGER /* LAESTAB code for the school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_phase" INTEGER /* Phase of the school (e.g., Primary, Secondary, Special School) */,
  "school_type" INTEGER /* Type of school (e.g., Community School, Faith School) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the school */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the school */,
  "headteacher" TEXT /* Name of the headteacher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff in the school */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "is_special_needs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school is a special needs school */,
  "is_accredited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school is accredited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_phase FOREIGN KEY ("school_phase") REFERENCES school_phases ("school_phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pupil_data" (
  "pupil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pupil data entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the pupils attend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the pupil data was collected */,
  "total_pupils" INTEGER /* Total number of pupils at the school */,
  "fsm_taken" INTEGER /* Number of pupils eligible for free school meals (FSM) */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of pupils by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of pupils by ethnicity */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Average attendance rate for the year */,
  "average_gcse_score" REAL /* Average GCSE score for the year (if applicable) */,
  "number_of_special_needs" INTEGER /* Number of pupils with special educational needs */,
  "number_of_english_as_additional_language" INTEGER /* Number of pupils with English as an additional language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pupil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupil_data_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the performance data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the performance data was collected */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., GCSE results, Attendance) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., academic, behavioral) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., percentage, points) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "is_religious" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school type is religious */,
  "is_state_funded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school type is state-funded */,
  "average_funding_per_pupil" REAL /* Average funding per pupil for this school type */,
  "common_locations" TEXT /* Common locations where this school type is found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_phases" (
  "school_phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school phase */,
  "school_phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the school phase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school phase */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of pupils in the school phase */,
  "typical_subjects" TEXT /* Typical subjects taught in the school phase */,
  "average_class_size" INTEGER /* Average class size for the school phase */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in this phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teacher, administrator, policymaker) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions and roles */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or role within the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the school data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the school data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data accessed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
